description: Top 3 registered passenger-car models inside each brand by count. Use when user asks top models grouped by brand; preserve the brand/model grouping, not a global top 3.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | STATS model_count = COUNT(*) BY brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword, model = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.Model.KoeretoejModelTypeNavn.keyword | INLINESTATS brand_total = SUM(model_count) BY brand | SORT brand_total DESC, brand ASC, model_count DESC | LIMIT 3 BY brand | SORT brand_total DESC, brand ASC, model_count DESC | LIMIT 60
